summary: Created imetaTag.ts with buildImetaTag(attachment, role): string[] — hand-rolled NIP-92 serialiser with role field, no applesauce-common dependency. Created imageMessage.ts with buildImageMessageContent(caption), parseImageMessageContent(content), and extractAttachmentsByRole(tags). Null-safe: parseImageMessageContent returns null for non-JSON, wrong type, missing version, and poll discriminators. extractAttachmentsByRole handles missing role (treated as full), ignores non-imeta tags. 24 unit tests cover all round-trips and null paths. Imports use @internet-privacy/marmot-ts package root (exports-map compliant).
